shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: Victim in Lackawanna River death identified
shorts.title_distilled: Victim in Lackawanna River death identified.
shorts.description: SOUTH SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The coroner has identified the man who drowned in the Lackawanna River on Thursday. Lackawanna County Coroner Tim Rowland identified the victim as 56-year-old Eric Miller. The cause of Miller's death was drowning and hypothermia. Rescue workers were alerted to the victim around 11:50 a.m. Thursday. Scranton Fire Chief John [...]
shorts.content: SOUTH SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The coroner has identified the man who drowned in the Lackawanna River on Thursday. Lackawanna County Coroner Tim Rowland identified the victim as 56-year-old Eric Miller. The cause of Miller's death was drowning and hypothermia. Rescue workers were alerted to the victim around 11:50 a.m. Thursday. Scranton Fire Chief John [...]
